puzzleDescription: Learn the basis of sorting: Swapping. If the first number is bigger than the second, swap their positions.
objective: Given the array {20, 10}, check if the first element is greater than the second. If yes, swap them so the output becomes 10 20.
hints: To swap, you need a 'temp' variable so you don't lose the first value.
This is a standard 3-step swap process.
